hero.headline: Expert Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX

featureSections.title: Comprehensive Auto Repair & Maintenance
featureSections.body: From routine oil changes to complex engine repairs, our ASE-certified technicians handle it all. We use state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to ensure your vehicle runs smoothly and safely.
featureSections.cardBody: Every repair comes with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty, so you can drive with confidence.

featureSections.title: Transparent & Honest Pricing
featureSections.body: We provide detailed estimates before any work begins, with no hidden fees. Our commitment to transparency has made us a favorite among Dallas drivers.
bullets: Competitive rates on parts and labor
featureSections.cardBody: Book your appointment in minutes through our easy online system. We'll have you in and out quickly.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Running Perfectly?

servicesPage.intro: At R & B Automotive, we offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services in Dallas, TX. From simple oil changes to major engine overhauls, our certified technicians have the expertise to keep your vehicle running at its best.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert engine repairs using advanced equipment.
services.longDescription: Our technicians use the latest diagnostic tools to pinpoint engine issues quickly. Whether it's a check engine light, rough idling, or performance loss, we provide effective repairs to restore your engine's power and efficiency.
benefits: Repairs for all makes and models
Comprehensive warranty on parts and labor

process.title: Diagnostic Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our advanced scanner to retrieve error codes and data.

process.title: Inspection & Estimate
process.description: Our technician inspects the issue and provides a detailed, no-obligation estimate.

process.title: Repair & Testing
process.description: We perform the repair using quality parts and test drive to confirm the fix.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within one hour, allowing us to provide a same-day repair estimate.

faqs.question: Do you repair check engine lights?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in check engine light diagnostics and repairs, covering everything from sensor issues to major engine problems.

services.title: Brake Service & Repair
services.shortDescription: Complete brake inspection, repair, and replacement for safety.
services.longDescription: Your safety is our priority. We inspect brake pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid levels to ensure optimal stopping power. From squeaky brakes to pedal issues, we restore your braking system to factory standards.

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: We check pad thickness, rotor condition, caliper function, and fluid level.

process.title: Recommendation
process.description: We explain what needs repair and provide a clear estimate.

process.title: Service & Test
process.description: We replace worn parts, bleed the system if needed, and test drive for proper operation.

faqs.question: How often should I replace brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000 to 50,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits. We inspect them at every visit.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake problems?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, vibration, or a soft pedal indicate it's time for a brake inspection.

services.title: Oil Change & Routine Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine healthy with regular oil changes and maintenance.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are vital for engine longevity. We use premium synthetic and conventional oils and also perform a multi-point inspection to catch potential issues early. Our maintenance services include fluid checks, filter replacements, and tire rotations.
benefits: Free multi-point inspection with every oil change

process.title: Oil Drain & Filter Change
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the filter, and refill with the recommended oil grade.

process.title: Multi-Point Inspection
process.description: We check belts, hoses, fluids, tires, and lights for any issues.

process.title: Reset & Cleanup
process.description: We reset your oil life monitor and clean up any spills.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality conventional and synthetic oils from top brands to meet your vehicle's specifications.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most modern cars need an oil change every 5,000 to 7,500 miles. Check your owner's manual for specifics.

services.title: AC & Heating System Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable year-round with expert AC and heating service.
services.longDescription: From weak airflow to no cold air, our technicians diagnose and repair AC and heating systems efficiently. We service compressors, condensers, evaporators, and HVAC controls to ensure your comfort in Dallas's extreme weather.
benefits: Fast AC recharge and leak repair
Heater core and blower motor repair

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor operation, and airflow.

process.title: Diagnostic Test
process.description: We use specialized tools to identify leaks or component failures.

process.title: Repair & Performance Check
process.description: We repair or replace faulty parts and verify system performance.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a leak. We can diagnose and fix the issue.

faqs.question: Do you repair car heaters?
faqs.answer: Yes, we repair heating systems including heater cores, blower motors, and thermostat issues.

about.headline: Your Trusted Auto Mechanic in Dallas Since 1995
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair with transparent pricing and exceptional customer service.
story: R & B Automotive was founded in 1995 by Robert and Brenda, a husband-and-wife team with a passion for cars and community. Starting as a small two-bay shop on Corinth Street, they built a reputation for integrity and skilled workmanship. Over the years, the shop grew as word spread about their fair pricing and thorough repairs.

Today, R & B Automotive continues that legacy under the same family ownership. Our team of ASE-certified technicians serves Dallas drivers with the same commitment to quality and honesty that started it all. We treat every car as if it were our own and every customer as a neighbor.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs—and what it doesn't.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow manufacturer specifications.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local events and treat every customer like family.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We stand behind our work with a solid warranty.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with R & B Automotive
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have questions? We're here to help.
